summary: Save a custom template as regular template
description: Save a custom template as regular template. Endpoint: POST /c/{company_id}/offers/{offer_id}/auto_reply_templates/save_as_template. Required parameters: title, offer_id, company_id. Optional parameters include translations, template_attachment_assignments.

params.name: title
params.description: Name of the newly created template

params.name: template_attachment_assignments
params.description: Array of template attachment assignments, parameters: (id attachment_id)
